chunks.text: Technical Reports - Martin Vetterli. Error Analysis in Oversampled A/D Conversion and Quantization of Weyl-Heisenberg Frame Expansions (M95/48) by Z. Cvetkovic and Martin Vetterli.
chunks.question: What is the title and authors of the technical report M95/48?
chunks.answer: Error Analysis in Oversampled A/D Conversion and Quantization of Weyl-Heisenberg Frame Expansions by Z. Cvetkovic and Martin Vetterli.

chunks.text: Technical Reports - Martin Vetterli. Time-Varying Channels with Side Information and Separation Principle (M94/103) by M. Khansari and Martin Vetterli.
chunks.question: What is the title and authors of the technical report M94/103?
chunks.answer: Time-Varying Channels with Side Information and Separation Principle by M. Khansari and Martin Vetterli.
